title: rubia dolichophylla
intro: Rubia dolichophylla, also known as Chinese rubia or Chinese galium, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthraquinone content, which has shown potential in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubia dolichophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate constipation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rubia dolichophylla is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
